#17 [ore-fetch 1/1] RUN ore_err() {       printf '{"level":"error","stage":"ore-fetch"' >&2;       printf ',"check":"%s","message":"%s"' "$1" "$2" >&2;       printf '%s}\n' "${3:+,$3}" >&2; exit 1;     }     && ore_log() {       printf '{"level":"info","stage":"ore-fetch"' >&2;       printf ',"check":"%s","message":"%s"}\n' "$1" "$2" >&2;     }     && if [ -z "7a442ae9ccf36f8612993e6e2ed0cf5d8c974145d7de2d97aba9f985cee908ab" ]        && ! echo "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/contriboss/ore-light/811cee6f49f4946cddf5e950149fe91bcae8acbb/scripts/install.sh"             | grep -qE '/[0-9a-f]{40}/'; then         ore_err "ore_sha256_guard"           "ORE_URI points to a branch"           ""ore_uri":"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/contriboss/ore-light/811cee6f49f4946cddf5e950149fe91bcae8acbb/scripts/install.sh"";        fi     && curl -fsSL -o /tmp/ore-install.sh "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/contriboss/ore-light/811cee6f49f4946cddf5e950149fe91bcae8acbb/scripts/install.sh"     && if [ -n "7a442ae9ccf36f8612993e6e2ed0cf5d8c974145d7de2d97aba9f985cee908ab" ]; then         echo "7a442ae9ccf36f8612993e6e2ed0cf5d8c974145d7de2d97aba9f985cee908ab  /tmp/ore-install.sh"           | sha256sum -c -         || ore_err "ore_sha256"              "checksum mismatch"              ""expected":"7a442ae9ccf36f8612993e6e2ed0cf5d8c974145d7de2d97aba9f985cee908ab"";        else         ore_log "ore_checksums_txt"           "ORE_SHA256 blank — fetching checksums.txt";         curl -fsSL -o /tmp/checksums.txt           "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/contriboss/ore-light/811cee6f49f4946cddf5e950149fe91bcae8acbb/scripts/checksums.txt"         || ore_err "ore_checksums_txt"              "failed to fetch checksums.txt"              ""uri":"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/contriboss/ore-light/811cee6f49f4946cddf5e950149fe91bcae8acbb/scripts/checksums.txt"";         cd /tmp         && sha256sum -c checksums.txt --ignore-missing         || ore_err "ore_checksums_txt"              "checksums.txt verification failed"              ""uri":"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/contriboss/ore-light/811cee6f49f4946cddf5e950149fe91bcae8acbb/scripts/checksums.txt"";        fi
#17 CACHED

#29 [base 3/5] RUN target=""     && if [ -z "$target" ]; then          ruby_major="$(ruby -e 'print RUBY_VERSION.split(".").first')";          if [ "$ruby_major" -ge 4 ]; then target="4.0.6";          else target="3.6.2"; fi;        fi     && current="$(gem --version)"     && if [ "$current" != "$target" ]; then          gem update --system "$target" --no-document          && (gem uninstall rubygems-update -x 2>/dev/null || true)          && rm -rf /usr/local/bundle/cache/*.gem;        fi
